Volume confirmation is 5.6% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.

Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.4 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.96, average source quality 0.83, confidence 0.69.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.02).
Overall model score is 0.161 with medium confidence.
